summary: Iteration 31: Comprehensive testing of A/B Testing system. All 16 backend API tests passed (CRUD operations, event tracking, statistics aggregation). Frontend: Admin A/B Tests panel fully functional - test creation, variant management, statistics display, pause/play/delete controls all working. Public pages /sauny and /balie load correctly with CTA buttons. OG meta tags contain ?w=1200&q=80 optimization params.
critical_code_review_comments: ABTestContext.jsx: Proper visitor ID persistence via cookie (wm_ab_vid), deterministic variant assignment via hash
ABTestContext.jsx: Impression deduplication via trackedImpressions Set - prevents duplicate tracking
AnalyticsAdmin.jsx ABTestsPanel: Complete CRUD UI with data-testid attributes for testing
server.py lines 3192-3297: A/B testing API endpoints properly exclude _id from MongoDB responses
server.py: Statistics aggregation uses MongoDB pipeline with unique visitor counting
index.html lines 14,24: OG image URLs contain ?w=1200&q=80 optimization params - CORRECT
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_Iteration31_Balie_CTA test during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B testing system is fully functional. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/ab/tests, GET /api/ab/active, POST /api/ab/event. Frontend: Admin panel has 'A/B Тесты' tab under Analytics group (data-testid='admin-tab-ab_tests'). Existing test 'Hero CTA Test' has real statistics (2 impressions, 1 click on variant A). Cookie consent banner may need dismissal before admin interactions.

backend_get_active_tests.details: GET /api/ab/active returns list of active tests

backend_admin_list_tests.details: GET /api/admin/ab/tests returns tests with aggregated stats

backend_admin_create_test.details: POST /api/admin/ab/tests creates test with variants, returns test object

backend_statistics_aggregation.details: Stats include impressions, clicks, unique_impressions, unique_clicks per variant

backend_auth_protection.details: Admin endpoints return 401 without auth header

frontend_sauny_page.details: /sauny loads with Hero section, CTA buttons visible

frontend_balie_page.details: /balie loads with Hero section, 52 buttons found

frontend_admin_ab_tab.details: A/B Tests tab accessible via data-testid='admin-tab-ab_tests'

frontend_ab_create_form.details: Form with name input, button select, variant inputs (PL/EN text, color)

frontend_ab_test_list.details: Tests displayed with status badge, variant stats, conversion rates, winner indicator

og_image_optimization.details: index.html og:image and twitter:image contain ?w=1200&q=80 params
